description_long: This is a heavy-duty pipe wrench featuring a robust, dark metallic head with a prominent adjustable jaw mechanism. The wrench's handle is elongated and appears to be made of wood, displaying a slightly worn, multicolored finish with green and brown hues. The head of the wrench includes a knurled adjustment knob and a toothed jaw, designed for gripping and turning pipes or other cylindrical objects. The metal components show a matte, slightly rough surface, suggesting durability and frequent use. The handle transitions smoothly into the metal shaft, with a visible seam where the materials meet. No visible brand markings or logos are present, and the tool appears well-maintained with no significant rust or wear.
description: A sturdy pipe wrench with a dark metal adjustable head and a long, multicolored wooden handle. The tool is rugged and functional, showing minor signs of use but no major wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the jaw and the adjustment knob, with the handle receding backward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the handle and the detailed jaw mechanism, including the adjustment knob and teeth.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the handle and the back of the wrench head, with minimal detail on the jaw.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the handle and the other side of the jaw, mirroring view 1 but from the reverse angle.
